omitted_methods.commit: 3310e4b (HEAD of research/external-minoan-anchors; NEWER than P1's inherited la-lb-ritual copy)
omitted_methods.why_distinct: This is a SEPARATE executed method from EA-02. EA-02 = frozen=False naive mapping-SEARCH regime (in-sample FP 0.72-1.00, held-out FP 0.22-0.30, leans NO_POWER). EA-13 = frozen=True FIXED-a-priori-correspondence regime (no search), a different script producing a different result artifact.
omitted_methods.outcome_numbers: verdict POWERED_DESIGN; any_config_powered=true; best_config n=4,La=4,Lc=4 -> FP_frozen=0.043, REC_optimistic=0.91, gap=0.868, powered=true. At La=3 NOT powered (FP~0.24-0.42). Envelope of 16 configs ARTIFACT_VERIFIED in frozen_power_envelope.json.
omitted_methods.honest_semantics: The MD's honest reading is 'design-viable but scarcity-limited, NOT a crack': the one REAL confirmatory attempt (egyptian-calibration-gate branch) returned TRIVIAL_RECOVERY (single training record s~s, LOO flips 3->1); broader run stays SOURCE-limited by anchor scarcity. So the correct method outcome = DESIGN_CONDITIONALLY_POWERED (La>=4) + real-attempt-trivial, which MATERIALLY QUALIFIES EA-02's bare 'leans NO_POWER'.
omitted_methods.impact: P1 references 'a FROZEN correspondence model' only as a future LEVER inside EA-02's supersession text; it never records the executed frozen pass or its POWERED_DESIGN verdict. Confirmed omission mechanism: the frozen_power_pass artifacts exist ONLY at commit 3310e4b, absent from the older external_anchors snapshot inherited into la-lb-ritual that P1 read.

reproducibility-asymmetry CONFIRMED: continuity result JSONs are gitignored BUT hash-pinned in the TRACKED administrative_channel_closure.json (reproducible via committed sha256 ledger); ritual result JSONs are on-disk-readable BUT untracked/uncommitted with NO tracked hash pin (weaker reproducibility). P1's differing record_confidence wording for LC vs LR rows is therefore accurate.

MILD inflation: 7 external_anchors rows are DESIGNED_NOT_RUN / PROPOSED_ONLY (EA-03/04/05/06/09/10/11) — proposals/source-audits/scaffolds catalogued as 'method instances'. Transparent (clearly labeled, no verdicts claimed) so not a material error, but readers should not read the external_language count as executed LA methods; only EA-01 (frozen classifier), EA-02/EA-13 (power sims), EA-07/EA-12 (source audits) and the LC/LR campaigns are actually run.
